svg.title: WSPR and RBN receiver footprints by band
svg.desc: Geographic and numerical comparison of WSPR reporting receivers and Reverse Beacon Network skimmers.
svg.text: WSPR: distinct reporter/locator pairs seen during the seven-day window. RBN: active nodes advertising the band.
Locator centers; not exact station addresses. Snapshot ends 2026-07-17 17:00 UTC.
